sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105786" key="trwglu/drion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρωγλύδριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρώγλη,</foreign> <sense id="n105786.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a small hole,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg030:1:366" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.366</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
